classes.name: Bastion
classes.description: Team gains 12 Armor & MR. Bastions gain more, doubled first 10s.

classes.name: Brawler
classes.description: Team gains 7% HP. Brawlers gain more.

classes.name: Challenger
classes.description: Team gains 10% AS. On kill, dash + 50% AS 2.5s.

classes.name: Conduit
classes.description: Innate: +20% Mana from all sources. Team gains Mana Regen.

bonuses.4: +20% Crit Chance & Damage, crits are Lucky

classes.name: Replicator
classes.description: Abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: Gain AD & AP. At 50% HP, slip into shadows.

classes.name: Vanguard
classes.description: 5% Durability while Shielded. Shield at combat start & 50% HP.

classes.name: Voyager
classes.description: Tanks get Shield, others get Damage Amp. Voyagers double.

origins.name: Anima
origins.description: Lose streak trait. Gain 15 Tech on losses, plus 5× loss streak length. Gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown. At 100 Tech, prototype Anima Weapons.

origins.name: Arbiter
origins.description: Scribe a unique divine law — choose a cause and effect for Arbiters.

origins.name: Dark Star
origins.description: Create black holes that consume weakened enemies.

bonuses.2: Create a black hole that consumes enemies at 10% max HP
bonuses.6: Strongest Dark Star goes supermassive (100% effectiveness, 2 minor black holes)
bonuses.9: All supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE

origins.name: Mecha
origins.description: Mecha units can transform into Ultimate form.

origins.name: Meeple
origins.description: Attract Meeps that empower abilities.

bonuses.10: 6 Meeps, 6%, 500 HP + SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!

origins.name: N.O.V.A.
origins.description: 6 seconds into combat, grant a power surge.

origins.name: Primordian
origins.description: 8% damage taken → damage dealt.

bonuses.3: 45% more Swarmlings + gain random champ each round

origins.name: Psionic
origins.description: Gain Psionic items.

bonuses.4: If holder is Psionic, items gain extra effects

origins.name: Space Groove
origins.description: Groovians enter The Groove.

origins.name: Stargazer
origins.description: Chart different constellation each game. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain bonuses.

origins.name: Timebreaker
origins.description: Loses grant free rerolls, wins store XP.

bonuses.2: Lose → free rerolls; Win → store XP

origins.name: Bulwark
origins.description: Summon a placeable relic. Combat start: grants adjacent allies 10% max HP Shield and 10% AS.

bonuses.1: Summon a relic that shields and buffs adjacent allies

origins.name: Commander
origins.description: Gain a random Command Mod every 2 rounds to alter ally combat behavior.

bonuses.1: Gain a random Command Mod every 2 rounds

origins.name: Dark Lady
origins.description: Allies take 5% less ability damage, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

origins.name: Divine Duelist
origins.description: Tactician heals 15% of player damage from winning. Fiora always wins a 1v1 duel.

origins.name: Doomer
origins.description: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. First damage steals 12% AD & AP for Vex.

origins.name: Eradicator
origins.description: Enemies have 10% less Armor and Magic Resist.

bonuses.1: Enemies have less Armor and Magic Resist

origins.name: Factory New
origins.description: After combat, open an armory for permanent upgrade for Graves.

bonuses.1: Open an armory for Graves after combat

origins.name: Galaxy Hunter
origins.description: While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus AD.

bonuses.1: Zed gains bonus AD while a clone is alive

origins.name: Gun Goddess
origins.description: Choose between Conduit, Challenger, or Replicator Mode.

bonuses.1: Choose Conduit, Challenger, or Replicator Mode

origins.name: Oracle
origins.description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

bonuses.1: Tahm Kench grants a reward every 3 rounds

origins.name: Party Animal
origins.description: At 45% HP, become untargetable and repair 15% max HP/s. At full HP, enter The Groove.

bonuses.1: Become untargetable at low HP and repair to full

origins.name: Redeemer
origins.description: For each non-unique active trait, team gains 2%/3%/4% AS and 2/2.5/3 Armor & MR.

bonuses.1: Gain bonuses for each non-unique active trait
